programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow comes from Castle Ward on the shores of Strangford Lough in Northern Ireland, where Fiona Bruce discovers that the architecture of this unusual house has something of a split personality.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce discovers what was really inside a 200 year old bottle of wine that Andy McConnell foolishly tasted in 2016 and traces the history of a chocolate treat in the shape of the nurse that dates back to the First World War.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow is at Battle Abbey, where treasures brought along include an incredibly rare Beatles guitar with an enviable history, which turns out to be one of the most valuable items ever seen on the show.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow is in the grounds of Salisbury Cathedral in Wiltshire, where experts discover an eclectic mix of treasures including Napoleon's razor, letters from Enid Blyton and a piece of Queen Victoria's underwear.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow comes from the foreshore beside the V&A Dundee design museum in Scotland. Fiona Bruce goes aboard the Discovery to uncover the epic story of the ship and Antarctic explorer Robert Falcon Scott.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow comes from the lush surroundings of the National Botanic Garden of Wales in Carmarthenshire. Fiona Bruce explores the Victorian mania for collecting exotic plants and examines rare species grown inside the gigantic bio-dome.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow returns to the vibrant setting of Morden Hall Park in south London. We discover personal letters written by Mother Teresa and an exquisite bronze by the father of South African sculpture, Anton Van Wouw.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Lytham Hall in Lancashire, finds include a chair that is believed to be from Nelson's flagship, a gruesome insight into Victorian dentistry and a fantastic series of watercolours rescued from a skip and worth thousands.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow returns to the magnificent setting of Compton Verney in Warwickshire. Treasures brought in include illustrations from the 1930s, bronze statues from Benin in West Africa and a rare Chinese incense burner worth a small fortune.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow returns to Castle Ward in Northern Ireland, an unusual 18th-century mansion and backdrop to hit TV series Game of Thrones.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.desc: Jon visits a Las Vegas dive to teach the owner of Jack's Place how to act less like a mother and more like a boss.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A Las Vegas dive struggles under an owner who makes more enemies than friends, so it's up to Jon to step in and teach a lesson on civility.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Sanford, Florida to revitalize a retro-arcade bar that is falling apart and an owner who has an excuse for everything.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon crashes the party at a failing bar where out-of-control bartenders would rather dance than pour drinks.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jenny McCarthy joins Jon to help the Thunderbolt Bar & Grill, whose owner is an inexperienced man with poor leadership skills, and his only ally is threatening to withdraw her services.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon's attempt to save the YNot Sports Pub & Grub gets off to a bad start when there isn't enough staff on hand for a stress test.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon brings his team to The Palace, a Moroccan-themed bar and restaurant in Upland, CA, where one owner puts the business at risk by drinking the inventory and refusing to try new ideas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When a military veteran/bar owner responds to criticism of his philanthropic work with nasty comments online, his business is sent into a tailspin.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A lackadaisical owner may lose more than his Irish pub if Jon isn't able to help him take charge and end the fighting among his bartenders.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Ybor City, Florida, Jon helps rescue a bar owner who made some questionable choices on the theme, decor, and menu in her bar.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Manny suffers a life-altering injury during a rescue, April tries to save him from himself. Neely meets her match in Alex when she tries to discredit Mitch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: April and Jessie search for the perfect celebrity host for a seaside beauty contest. Mitch and Alex help Manny adjust to his paralysis.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Alex's search for the creator of several elaborate sandcastles is interrupted when she gets stuck entertaining her best friend's fiancée, who falls madly for Mitch. Cody loses his cool when his new boat is stolen while he's scuba diving with Newmie.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Mitch envisions an International "Top Gun" style lifeguard school in Hawaii. He invites Sean Monroe to lead the new team, which will include a variety of highly-rated lifeguards from beaches around the world.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Amidst the chaos, the new Baywatch Hawaii team must learn to work and live together. Jason meets a man with a mysterious past. A girl Mitch saved suffers from secondary drowning, leading to a critical test of the new recruits.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Tanner visits Mitch, tours the Islands, and befriends a dying girl. After failing her initial "test", Dawn challenges Sean to a dangerous contest with her future at Baywatch hanging in the balance. JD competes to join the America's Cup Sailing Team.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Tanner believes The Shark Island Legend. Mitch doesn't. Team Baywatch competes with the Coast Guard. Jessie and Kekoa both dump JD. Swimming naked in a Hawaiian purification ritual, Jesse has to make a rescue in the nude.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean leads Team Baywatch on a daring night rescue in shark-infested waters to save 6 kayaking teens stranded off the perilous Na Pali coast.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Jessie and Kekoa battle each other even as they rescue a man stranded behind a waterfall! Sean and Allie search for treasure. JD and Jason help two girls save a cat caught on a boat mast, but wind up catapulting it across the water!

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean threatens to kick Jason off the team after Jason defies his orders and makes a daring rescue. Allie, Dawn, and Nick have to save a drowning man and his pregnant wife about to give birth in the ocean.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean is faced with a life-or-death decision during a daring cave rescue in which Kekoa faces her greatest fear. Hobie plans to get married, but Mitch is at odds with his fiancée’s obnoxious parents.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: The Team hunts men mutilating sharks for their fins. Jason, who's always feared sharks, learns to accept the local tradition that sharks are sacred protectors of the Hawaiian Islands.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Allie discovers a rare Hawaiian coin from a ship that sank after the Pearl Harbor attack. Sean lets the team dive for sunken treasure provided it doubles as a training exercise. The deep-sea dive leads to discord, dissent, and explosive danger.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Allie is terrified she may lose the love of her life when Nick gets the bends in a daring attempt to rescue a mini-sub on the ocean floor.

programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville as Eduardo Dantas puts his Bantamweight world title on the line against Darrion Caldwell. This stacked fight card also features Daniel Straus taking on Emmanuel Sanchez and Pat Curran facing off against John Macapa.

programme.title: Bellator 185: Mousasi vs. Shlemenko
programme.desc: The elite two-division threat, Gegard Mousasi makes his Bellator debut against former Middleweight Champion Alexander Shlemenko who is on a five-fight win streak.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Penn State as accomplished alumni Phil Davis and Ed Ruth return to their roots. Light Heavyweight Champ Ryan Bader defends his belt. Plus Ilima-Lei Macfarlane and Emily Ducote clash for the inaugural flyweight world title!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Dublin as Irish fan-favorite Brian Moore meets undefeated rising sensation, AJ McKee. Baby Slice returns to the cage, and Conor McGregor’s training partner Charlie Ward battles John Redmond in a fight sure to provide fireworks!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator is back with featherweight action as world champion Julia Budd puts her title on the line in a grudge rematch against Australian Arlene Blencowe.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Italy with a huge middleweight world title fight. Local hero Alessio Sakara will have the crowd on his side as he looks to dethrone current champion Rafael Carvalho, who comes in riding a six fight Bellator win streak of his own.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator brings the fight action from Newcastle, UK, as two newly inked superstars make their Bellator debuts. Both Valérie Létourneau and Michael McDonald will look for statement wins in the Bellator cage as they aim to send a message to their rivals.

programme.title: Bellator 192: Rampage vs Sonnen
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes over The Forum with a highly anticipated showdown between “The American Gangster” Chael Sonnen and Rampage Jackson. Also, Douglas Lima and Rory MacDonald clash for the welterweight belt and Michael Chandler collides with Goiti Yamauchi.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Pechanga Resort and Casino with a contender showdown as Lorenz Larkin takes on Fernando Gonzalez. Plus Saad Awad looks to keep his hot streak alive against J .J. Ambrose. And AJ Matthews goes to war when he faces Kendall Grove!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Thomas Cogdell was 12 when he and his mom discovered his 11-year-old sister, Kaylee, dead, tied up on her bed. Now 18, Thomas shares what he experienced on that fateful day. Don't miss this compelling look at false confessions & justice gone wrong.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Trisha, a mother and wife, who is live-streaming her entire life. Find out what caused Trisha to storm off and collapse on stage. Did Dr. Phil almost have to call the paramedics? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Caroline & Sonny admit their nearly 3-yr marriage has been tumultuous with both sides alleging verbal & physical abuse. The situation worsened when the unthinkable happened: Sonny cheated on Caroline with her sister, Ashley, after a night of drinking.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jean says her 17-year-old daughter, Cheyenne, was the all-American girl , a cheerleader, track star and straight-A honor student until she began dating Josh, a 28-year-old divorced father. Dr. Phil takes a look at Josh's history, should Jean be concerned?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mark & ex-wife, Melissa, say daughter, Malia, 17, has been running away since age 13, a 6th grade school drop out, & has become physically abusive. They say 2 years ago she became involved with a 35-year-old man & they fear she'll end up dead.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Is it wrong to go dating for dollars? Dr. Phil's guests say if you want to court them, you have to pay to play! Two self-proclaimed gold diggers share their tips for getting loot, and a woman wonders if it's wrong to be attracted to wealthy men.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Stacey & Dan say daughter Tylor, 18, is a rageaholic who is verbally, mentally & physically abusive. They have called the police 30 times, have had Tylor arrested 10 times & now Tylor is 7 weeks pregnant! Can this family join forces for the unborn child?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Anita, 73, married to the CEO of fast food restaurant chain Wendy's, is a felon, convicted of scamming friends & employees out of a half million dollars. Anita said she was duped by Ohio State, NFL quarterback, Art Schlichter. Victim or co-conspirator?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Courtney claims her former friend Amie has lied about being pregnant three times and losing five babies total. To uncover the truth, Dr. Phil producers spoke with the county coroner, the hospital, and tracked down one of the supposed fathers-to-be. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Stephanie was an aspiring songwriter who loved taking care of kids. Diana was a preschool teacher with a bright future. Neither of these women knew they could end up addicted to drugs.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil meets a hard-working nurse who says in 2013 she bought a timeshare in Cabo San Lucas. She received a call from an "an attorney" in Mexico stating there was a data breach at her resort & she was entitled to a $38,580 settlement. See what unfolds!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Marie says husband Ron has a violent temper & she fears her safety & of their 4-yr-old. She alleges Ron pushed her down the stairs & wrote "kill" on a bathroom mirror. Ron says Marie mixes her meds with alcohol. Dr. Phil cameras record the chaos at home.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Susan emailed Dr. Phil claiming she's at war with her son-in-law, David & daughter, Bekah. Susan is not sure why she's not allowed to see her grandchildren, but claims Bekah blames her "sinful behavior." Can Susan mend things to see her grandkids again?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Four adult siblings say they've been blacklisted by their mother from seeing their dying father, a claim their mother vehemently denies. Emotions run high when this fractured family comes together on Dr. Phil’s stage. Can they put an end to the fighting?

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Chef Sophia Roe is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up something delicious. Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in Drew's News and sharing their best weekend suggestions.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tamera Mowry Housley opens up about sharing her spicy to-do list with her husband in her new memoir, "You Should Sit Down For This!," the possibility of a "Sister, Sister" reboot and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson is filling in for Drew as co-host for the day! "SNL" star Melissa Villasenor is joining 50 Cent and Ross Mathews at the news desk to break down the latest headlines including a Blockbuster themed pop up speakeasy.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Fleishman Is In Trouble" star Jesse Eisenberg shares his thoughts on dating apps, relationships and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by "Peter Pan and Wendy" star Jim Gaffigan to talk all about his new movie. Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bronwyn Tarboton is sharing some genius upcycling tips including how to create home décor out of items in your trash.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Poker Face" star Natasha Lyonne is telling Drew about her new show, her partnership with Maya Rudolph and whether she would do an "American Pie" reboot.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Schmigadoon!" star Kristin Chenoweth is telling Drew about meeting Ariana Grande for the first time, her date with Prince, and the time Nicole Kidman helped her out at a party.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jessica Biel tells Drew about dog sledding and plays "The Real Biel" trivia. Derek Blasberg joins Drew and Ross to cover news, including Dolly Parton's award and throwback fashion.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up! Plus, Jenny Mollen is joining them at the news desk for a trip giveaway.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's Drew's birthday and we're celebrating all show long with some special surprises for her! "You" star Penn Badgley is surprising Drew with a special birthday present and telling her all about the new season of his hit show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tori Spelling and Jennie Garth are telling Drew about their thirty-five-year-long friendship, meeting on the set of "90210" and their podcast "90210MG." Ross Mathews is sharing how to makeover your vanity with some easy DIY tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, in all new Drew Crime, Drew meets mixed martial artist Ro Malabanan.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Dictator Lunches" author Jenny Mollen joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk covering everything from Ashton Kutcher and wife Mila Kunis's no closed-door policy to a mom who went viral for changing her son's name at 18-months.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: RuPaul's Drag Race" host RuPaul is talking about the show and helping Drew come up with her drag name!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: CBS Mornings Co-Hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil and Nate Burleson join Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk breaking down everything.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Abbott Elementary" star Lisa Ann Walter is joining Drew as a co-pilot all show long and talking all about "Abbott Elementary" and working with Lindsay Lohan on "The Parent Trap!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Alaska Daily" star Hilary Swank joins Drew to chat. Plus, "Ghosts" stars Utkarsh Ambudkar is helping serve the news sunny-side up by joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The People we Hate at the Wedding" stars Ben Platt and Dustin Milligan stop by to chat about their new film. Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's an all-new Drewber, when "Enola Homes 2" star Mille Bobby Brown, joins Drew in her mini- van to chat while cruising around NYC dishing on her worst fear, her dream role, which "Stranger Things" cast member is her bff and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News. Chef Dayanny De La Cruz is sharing some delicious tailgate ready snacks. We've got a special puppy bowl with Katherine Schwarzenegger and official Puppy Bowl Ref Dan Schachner.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering topics like the solutions you can try if you're a chronic late texter and the reason many people are opting for environmentally friendly burials.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are back at the news desk and hitting the hottest headlines. Drew-crew member Pilar Valdes is sharing pro tips for making burgers. Horticulturist Chris Freimuth is sharing some easy flower tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Mindy Kaling talks holiday prep with kids, shares behind-the-scenes stories from "The Office" and "Oceans 8" and more. Drew & Ross Mathews cover snooze button science, dating ghosting debate, and saving a NY deli on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Senator Bernie Sanders is joining Drew to chat about his new book. He's also joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to discuss local Vermont headlines and share some of his favorite Vermont-based small businesses.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are covering the hottest headlines in an all-new Drew's News like the study that found laughter can be a giveaway for romantic attraction.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress and Director Elizabeth Banks reveals behind the scenes secrets about some of her most famous films and shares why her new film "Call Jane" is so important to her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny receives a box from Cousin Pearl in the hills. One of the items in the box is an old-fashioned crank telephone. Granny asks Jethro to hook it up to a party line on the pole, so she can listen in on the party line

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny despairs of Elly Mae ever finding a husband and decides to promote her non-existent cooking skills. She is entered into a TV show cook-off, but nothing she fixes is edible.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A con artist pretends to be someone from back home and stays with the Clampetts. She plans to get photos of Jed in a compromising position in order to blackmail him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to sophisticate Emaline, but she has bigger plans for blackmailing Mr. Drysdale with her cuckoo clock camera. The colonel continues to woo Granny. The two swindlers though haven't met someone as sharp as Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is chopping wood while a chimpanzee named May Bell watches. He wishes that he could teach May Bell to chop wood. When Elly May comes by, she and Jethro talk and decide that they want a gorilla.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts miss Herbie and ask Mr. Drysdale to get the tame gorilla back. The banker promises to help, but actually hinders the effort.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's soap making sends noxious smoke into the air, which gets the attention of smog commissioner Tinsley. He shuts down the operation, and Jed decides to run against him when he misunderstands Mr. Drysdale's advice.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed takes a job on the board of directors of O.K. Oil Company.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is so desperate to meet a woman that when Miss Hathaway's bird watching group arrives, he goes out of his way to try to impress the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: In order to buy Mrs. Drysdale a special Christmas present, the Clampetts take seasonal jobs in a department store.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny discovers Martians next door at the Drysdale mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny decides to take her share of the Clampett millions and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Granny decide to donate the burden of their millions to some college students and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Crowfoot Indians come to Beverly Hills to discuss a boundary dispute at the Clampett oil field, Granny prepares for war.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After reading the Society page, Granny decides the best way to get Elly a husband is to throw her a coming out party, complete with possum burgers and gopher gravy. Mrs. Drysdale, hoping to forever humiliate them, is all too happy to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Milburn 'Drysdale's precocious 11-year-old nephew swindles the hillbillies of all the valuable art objects in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett has inherited a castle in the English countryside. Jethro insists that everyone, except Granny, wear the royal raiment's of Elizabeth (the First, of course).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S03E018) Secrets are revealed during a girls-only spa retreat, and Brandon begins gambling with a bookie.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S03E019) Dylan's father is released on parole and David feels the fallout from a parent's infidelity.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S03E020) Suspicions arise over Jack's handling of Dylan's trust fund. David is offered a deal by a music label but is pressured to fire Steve as his manager.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S03E021) Jack and Dylan begin a new life together, living aboard a yacht with Dylan's enormous trust fund at their disposal. On the surface, everything seems perfect, but Jack has some dangerous enemies.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S03E022) After Dylan accepts an invitation to stay at the Walsh home, he finds that old demons have returned to haunt him

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S03E023) Brandon's gambling spins out of control. Donna feels that David's new record label is running his music.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S03E024) Kelly's obsession with her weight turns dangerous. Brandon and Steve vie for the same girl's attention on a television game show.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S03E025) The results of the Senior Poll are in, leading some to question whether it is exclusionary.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S03E026) Senior Ditch-School day proves memorable as thieves prey upon the gang at an amusement park and then Peach Pit.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S03E027) The students of West Beverly are horrified to learn that the school board has pushed through a measure that will bar any student found drunk at the prom from graduation.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S03E028) The group rallies around Donna after the school board rules that she cannot participate in graduation ceremonies because of her drunkenness at the prom.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S03E029) As graduation approaches, the teens of West Beverly make their final decisions about the future while reminiscing about the past.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E001) The gang kicks off college with a huge party. Brenda is uncertain about her decision. Andrea learns hurtful information about Gil.

programme.desc: Who will be evicted? Who will win the epic battle of endurance to become the new HoH? Plus a sneak peek into the jury house!

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will nominations for eviction change, forcing final alliances to be tested? Who will be evicted and who will make it to the final three?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The top three houseguests are surprised with messages from home. Plus witness never before seen laughs, emotions, and drama from this historic season!

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: This is the last stop before finale night. Who will advance and be one step closer to taking the grand prize?

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.desc: Ceaser and the crew crash Sky's vacation in Miami. Kitty launches an attack on Ceaser. Alex reveals his true feelings to Donna and an unexpected guest shows up seeking revenge.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew continues to turn up on South Beach. Alex is rushed to the emergency room after he collapses on the beach. Jadah and Tati come to blows. Ceaser throws a Scarfaced-themed party to impress a girl and Donna confesses her feelings to Alex.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Donna is jealous when Ceaser doesn't choose her to help open a new shop in NOLA (which drives a wedge between her and Alex), and Young Bae becomes a citizen and a mother.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Donna catches Alex partying with strippers, Sky's son makes a shocking announcement about his post-graduation plans, and Melody reaches out to her mom's estranged family.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: An old feud flares up when Jadah arrives in New Orleans, Walt confronts Ceaser about calling him a drunk, and Melody's estranged cousin stands her up.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Jadah shares big news, Miss Kitty asks Young Bae for a favor, Sky faces off with Herb, and the staff is shocked when the New Orleans shop is vandalized on opening day.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser fumes after discovering a New Orleans employee is a mole, Puma and O'S**t take advantage of Young Bae to wreck the 113th shop, and Alex's dad faces a risky surgery.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser reconnects with his daughter Cheyenne, Young Bae hires a new receptionist who has to prove herself to the crew, and Alex starts to notice some relationship red flags.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Tokie loses it during the crew's team-building retreat, Donna tries to make up with Alex, Young Bae's mom meets Rob for the first time, and Jadah copes with a family tragedy.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Sky gets news about her son Des, Young Bae's mom proves to be a handful for Rob, Tokie tries to work through issues from her past, and Donna issues Ceaser an ultimatum.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Melody's relationship with Lalo begins to fall apart, Ceaser hires Sky's son as an intern to keep him out of trouble, and Donna crashes the shop paint party to apologize.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser freaks out when Sky decides to open her own side business in Miami, Melody struggles to keep her family together, and Jadah gets revenge on Teddy for dating Tati.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Sky goes behind Ceaser's back to open her boutique in Miami, Young Bae's mom pressures her daughter to get married in two weeks, and Donna's twin sister disapproves of Alex.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The shop is divided over Ceaser's choice to replace Sky, Young Bae and Rob receive devastating news, and Teddy flips when Tati gets wasted and goes home with another guy.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: The Presentation
programme.desc: Mark is hired as a substitute teacher, but his roommate Robin must teach him how to control his students. Alan Thicke guest stars.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Hangin' With Michelle
programme.desc: Mark injures himself while performing a story for his substitute first-grade class, including Michelle Tanner (MARY KATE/ASHLEY OLSEN). Afterward, Mark is too embarrassed to keep his date with a beautiful woman (GALYN GORG).

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: On The Rebound
programme.desc: Mark's ex-girlfriend, Paula (LELA ROCHON), moves back into town and revives their passionate romance.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Please Pass the Jock
programme.desc: Mark helps a student basketball player (CHRISTOPHER CARTER) pass an important algebra test. Chris Tucker guest stars.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Cheers
programme.desc: When Mark coaches a girls' cheerleading team, he desperately asks Vanessa to help him train the untalented cheerleaders.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Warriors, Part I
programme.desc: After Mark finally gets a permanent teaching job as a basketball coach, he's offered a contract to play for the Warriors, a professional basketball team. First of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Warriors, Part II
programme.desc: Mark is given a temporary contract to play professional basketball with his favorite team, the Warriors. Unfortunately, Mark must play guard against basketball star Charles Barkley (HIMSELF). Second of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Torn Between Two Teachers
programme.desc: Mark and Robin try to make Andre choose between his interests in basketball and music.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Inspired by his childhood experiences, narrator Chris rock introduces the hilarious, touching story of a teenager. Struggling to cope with a new neighborhood and unfamiliar new School, while trying to keep his younger siblings in line at home.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris finally sees a chance to impress Keisha, the girl next door, when she's hired to help tutor drew after school.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Even though he can't play, Chris gets recruited for the junior high basketball team.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris catches a break from the neighborhood thugs when he befriends cool kid fat, Mike.

programme.desc: Cash-strapped college students Nikki and Kim Parker become a mother-daughter telephone psychic team.

programme.title: The Parkers
programme.desc: When Nikki, Kim and Stevie pledge with a sorority they are ordered to 'expose' Professor Oglevee.

programme.title: The Parkers
programme.desc: With Nikki’s help, the school geek becomes the campus hottie.

programme.title: The Parkers

programme.title: Girlfriends
programme.desc: Joan, who hasn't had sex in a year, decides to have a one-night stand with handsome restaurateur Davis.

programme.title: Girlfriends

programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Wichita en busca de un sospechoso que secuestra niños mientras sus padres duermen. Además, Morgan está intentando averiguar quién fue el responsable del ataque.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un sujeto ataca a la UAC, el equipo entra en acción para averiguar quién es el responsable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la ex miembro del equipo de la UAC y actual agente de la Interpol, Emily Prentiss localiza a un asesino en serie internacional, pide la ayuda de sus amigos de la UAC.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Policía bueno, policía malo
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un marine aparece al otro lado del mundo, la investigación obliga a Ziva a desenterrar un capítulo enterrado de su vida.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Código de conducta
programme.desc: Cuando un marine conocido por sus bromas pesadas es encontrado muerto en la víspera de Halloween, el equipo del NCIS descubre que las bromas "inocentes" de la víctima pueden haber inspirado una venganza macabra.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fugitivos y consuelo
programme.desc: Una investigación de asesinato lleva a Gibbs y al equipo a hacer de consejero familiar de su antiguo mentor, Mike Franks, con la esperanza de evitar un sangriento conflicto internacional.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fin del juego
programme.desc: Con la ayuda del equipo, Vance se enfrenta a sus demonios mientras descubre una compleja relación con un asesino que pone en peligro a toda su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La sombra de la duda
programme.desc: Jamie y Eddie investigan cuando una mujer sufre una reacción alérgica a su medicación y descubren que su esposo, un técnico de emergencia, no respondió a la llamada de emergencia pese a estar asignado para hacerlo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un triste adiós
programme.desc: Danny investiga las circunstancias de la desaparición de una ex oficial de la Policía de Nueva York que desaparece al día siguiente de revelarle que planeaba hacer las paces con la mujer que ella y su compañero condenaron injustamente años atrás.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Morgan es secuestrado, la UAC se apresura a buscarlo y salvarle la vida.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle Officially breaks it off with Santana over the phone. The crew bets on their Segway race, boys versus girls. The losers must become their opponents' servants for a day. A newly-single Lyle rekindles old desires in Mattie.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Bubba surprises Tiffany with an unexpected visit, but, Tiffany isn't sure how things will go after their recent arguments. After being rejected by numerous men at the bar, Hurricane Martha threatens the shores of Savannah.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The cast says goodbye to Savannah and to each other for the last time. Old wounds open up between Tiffany and Bubba. Santana attempts to win back Lyle. The crew buries a time capsule in the backyard.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Nothing is off-limits as the Party Down South Crew gets together one last time to share their favorite memories and relive their wildest moments from all five vacations together.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: South Carolina will never be the same when eight of the biggest, baddest personalities in the south come together in one house to work hard and party even harder for one wild summer.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Daddy's drinking is a cause for concern, the gang sobers up after a chaotic first night at the party house, and Murray accuses Daddy of breaking guy code.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lauren, Lyle, and Mattie find themselves in a love triangle, and the gang starts their first day of work at a marina, then engage in some country activities.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle and Mattie get into a brawl near the marina and are reprimanded by their boss, the crew unite for a peculiar meeting, and Lyle gets a surprise birthday party on a boat.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Walt clues Daddy in on an unpleasant drinking incident, the gang shares intimate stories about their personal lives, and Lyle's attempt to find common ground with Lauren flops.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Mattie unleashes her alter ego Martha and pandemonium ensues, Tiffany has an emotional breakdown, the gang lets loose with friends, and Lyle encroaches on Lauren's space.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle's jealousy over Mattie's booty popping leads to severe heartburn that leaves Lyle literally foaming at the mouth. After Mattie brings home her new crush, Tiffany throws fuel on the fire and pushes Lyle to his limit.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Tiffany warns Lyle that Mattie won't reciprocate his feelings, Walt helps Mattie see Lyle in a new light, and Tiffany yearns for ways to quell her sexual frustration.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Mattie goes on a date with Jason, Tiffany's hormones boil out of control (and Walt finds himself on the receiving end of it), and Mattie's alter ego Martha makes a reappearance.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The final three contestants face their last series of challenges, as only two will battle it out to decide the winner of Redneck Island and the $100,000 grand prize.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Fourteen rednecks descend on Steve Austin's tropical island for their chance to compete for $100,000.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: After a slip-sliding good time trying to win a bounty of coveted food, tensions run high when a couple of rednecks get into a fight over their booty.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Tensions run high with the hut-bound rednecks as a tropical storm rips through the island, but a surprise visit from Steve for a game of Beer Pong helps calm their angst and fill their bellies with some much-wanted snack food.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A personalized keychain casts doubt on a man’s flimsy story. A cyclist throws something behind his back as soon as deputies roll up. A laid-back driver’s estimation of what’s in his car is off by a couple trash bags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two cousins fight over a five dollar debt. Police arrest a man for domestic violence. A taxi cab driver is robbed and shot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man who threatened his neighbors redirects his anger toward the deputies, and a driver in crisis puts the lives of others on the line.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An eldery woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stabbing victim has his throat slashed while waiting for his wife. A man is shocked to learn that his rental box truck was reported stolen. Spice is found in a nervous passenger's purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a knife tries to evade police by hiding in bushes. Vice unit officers conduct a prostitution sting. When officers are shot at during a pursuit, the woman claims it was flashes from a camera.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist takes flight, police find a woman at the wheel of a stolen truck, and officers roll up on a couple smoking meth while their four-year-old is in the car with them.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man riding a bike at night with no lights decides to take off rather than talk with police, and a dangerous domestic dispute unfolds on the streets of Texas.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic dispute involving an assault with a tire iron. Police are led to a battered woman after she dials 911. Officers on patrol encounter a couple engaged in prostitution.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a stolen truck calls officers when he spots it in a nearby alley. A fleeing driver leads officers on a wild chase over a closed bridge. Police track down a suspect who gave a liquor store employee a phony $100 bill.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies confront a man holding a knife to his roommate’s neck over a prior argument. A suspect runs from deputies on a warrant charge. Suspected robbers are pulled over by deputies.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspected stolen vehicle and a pursuit ensues. Officers are called to a fight at a bar over a tossed drink. Police are called to the scene of two intoxicated siblings arguing.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: ¡Agáchate, maldito!

programme.title: Los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Hombres armados son contratados para proteger un pueblo mexicano de un grupo de bandidos en esta adaptación de “Seven Samurai” de Kurosawa.

programme.title: Moby Dick
programme.desc: Esta adaptación del clásico de Melville es insuperable en cuanto a entretenimiento, imaginación y aventura. Consumido por la rabia, el capitán Ahab (Gregory Peck) tiene un propósito en la vida: vengarse de la gran ballena blanca que lo desfiguró.

programme.title: Lila & Eve
programme.desc: Dos madres angustiadas, cuyos hijos murieron por disparos en un automóvil en movimiento, se unen para vengar sus muertes después de que las autoridades locales no tomen medidas.

programme.title: Madison

programme.title: El caso Thomas Crown
programme.desc: Thomas Crown (McQueen), un millonario de Boston, un hombre que se ha hecho a sí mismo, se aburre de la vida que lleva. Para huir de la rutina, prepara un golpe perfecto: robar un banco y marcharse después a Brasil.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: Bandidos

programme.title: Madison

programme.title: El juego del amor

programme.title: El apartamento

programme.title: A primera vista

programme.title: Juegos del corazón

programme.title: Los Kocainos

programme.title: El Pago
programme.desc: Michael Jennings trabaja en proyectos ultrasecretos. Luego de cada trabajo, borran su memoria.

programme.title: Domino

programme.title: Equilibrium
programme.desc: En el futuro, la humanidad ha prohibido cosas que producen emociones como la literatura, la música y el arte, para mantenerlo, un grupo especial de policías eliminará a los transgresores. Christian Bale protagoniza esta increíble película de acción.

programme.title: Piedras

programme.title: La reina de España

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: El infierno

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre

programme.title: Cujo

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VII: la nueva sangre

programme.title: Breakheart Pass

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City

programme.title: Quigley Down Under

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2000, Kristine Fitzhugh no se presentó a su clase de música y su esposo Ken la encontró muerta al pie de las escaleras de su casa de Palo Alto. Tras una investigación adicional, el luminol revela evidencia de un asesinato en la cocina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Dorothy Donovan fue asesinada en su casa de Dover, Delaware. Cuando su hijo declaró que fue asesinada por un polizón que la había recogido, la policía se mostró escéptica.

programme.desc: La policía estaba desconcertada por una huella oscura encontrada en la escena del crimen donde un hombre había sido asesinado y dos adolescentes resultaron gravemente heridas.

programme.desc: Una mujer joven de repente se enferma gravemente y, finalmente, no puede caminar. Una prueba de médula ósea revela la causa: arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una bomba casera estalló en una casa rural, la policía no tenía idea de quién era el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1988, cuando un paciente muere inesperadamente en el consultorio del neurólogo de California, Richard Boggs, la policía comienza lo que creen que será una investigación de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuatro caminos
programme.desc: Una mujer nativa americana fue brutalmente asesinada en el desierto de Nuevo México y la escena del crimen estaba llena de evidencia forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1980, Shannon Mohr, residente de Michigan, murió en lo que su nuevo esposo, David Davis, reportó que fue un accidente al montar a caballo. Después de su muerte, la familia de Shannon informó que Davis parecía estar lejos de estar agobiado por el dolor.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba practicando tiros en un hermoso día de primavera, Martin Dillon es asesinado con disparos. Su amigo sostiene que fue un extraño accidente, pero se necesitan más de 20 años para que la verdad salga a la luz.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer de 19 años fue encontrada muerta en su automóvil; la escena se había organizado para que el asesinato pareciera un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una pequeña niña se enfermó y murió, los investigadores se vieron sorprendidos. ¿Fue un accidente, una enfermedad inexplicable o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Lori Auker, de 19 años, salió de su casa de Pennsylvania para ir a trabajar y nunca llegó, se necesitó de la tecnología de la era espacial, pelos de gato e insectos para identificar al secuestrador de la mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer quien se ha conocido por sufrir de depresión aparentemente se quitó su propia vida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido apuñalada más de treinta veces y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. Cerca de su cabeza, la policía descubrió un distintivo botón con hebras de hilo todavía unidas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el Molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Archaeologist Julian Richards joins the excavation of a subterranean chamber in the Yorkshire Dales where Bronze Age man buried the dead. Plus, there's the first ever prehistoric footprint found in a British cave.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards and Dr Betty O'Brien rely on their expertise and numerous tests to examine the connection between an archaeological site in Donegal and the history of Christianity in Ireland.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Archaeologist Julian Richards joins the team excavating a massive stone coffin from a building site in Bristol, which should shed light on the Romans' extraordinarily industrious and lavish lifestyle.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Archaeologist Julian Richards investigates an impressive coffin dug up in Malesbury Abbey. Among the possible identities of the body within are a Saxon king, and Elmer, a monk who survived his attempt to fly from the top of the Abbey tower.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: A team examines the remains of two crouched bodies found in the isolated Somerset community of Bleadon, where modern DNA testing reveals a picture of the arduous life of iron age farmers.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Today a team works on one of the most impressive Anglo-Saxon graveyards ever discovered, on the US air force base in Suffolk. A warrior is discovered buried besides his horse, encircled by graves holding children, some buried with full size weapon.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: An Archaeologist joins an excavation team as they uncover a rare find from Roman cemetery: a lead coffin, only the second ever to be found in the Roman Winchester. Clues found inside the coffin bring to light the pagan beliefs of a wealthy Roman.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: John visits a couple who wanted to build a garage next to their bungalow.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards joins the excavation of a long-lost chapel and the burials of medieval landowners in a farmer's field in Cheshire. Using science, genealogy and some detective work, the team are able to bring a man face to face with his ancestors.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards studies the Roman sarcophagus discovered at an archaeological site in Spitalfields. The findings include other objects that could reveal some unheard stories from British history.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards studies the artefacts such as bronze brooches, silver rings, amber beads and ivory discovered at an archaeological site in Peterborough.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards investigates the numerous unidentified graves discovered in Buckinghamshire to understand the history of the neighbourhood and its residents.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards explores excavation sites where remains of human beings are discovered. He uses facial reconstruction technology to illuminate numerous stories lost in the mists of time.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
